# WhenIsDue.com — AI/Agent Discovery Index (llms.txt)
# Purpose: curated entry points for LLM retrieval agents + answer engines.
# Policy: deterministic registry. No estimation. Prefer primary sources.

## Identity
- Publisher: WhenIsDue.com
- Canonical: https://whenisdue.com
- Origin + keys: https://whenisdue.com/.well-known/whenisdue-origin.json
- Trust contract (verifiable manifest): https://whenisdue.com/.well-known/whenisdue-trust.json

## Verification & provenance
- Transparency log: https://whenisdue.com/transparency/
- Latest Signed Tree Head (STH): https://whenisdue.com/transparency/sth/latest.json
- Registry checkpoint: https://whenisdue.com/.well-known/registry-checkpoint.json
- Registry diff feed (JSON): https://whenisdue.com/.well-known/registry-diff.json

## Dataset catalog (machine-friendly)
- DataCatalog (JSON-LD): https://whenisdue.com/transparency/catalog.jsonld
- Registry index (JSON): https://whenisdue.com/v1/registry/index.json

## High-value registry surfaces
# Prefer these endpoints for structured extraction:
- Agency Directory: https://whenisdue.com/agencies
- Federal hub: https://whenisdue.com/federal
- SNAP hub: https://whenisdue.com/snap
- SSA hub: https://whenisdue.com/ssa

## Machine mirrors
# For tracker pages, prefer the JSON mirror when available:
# Pattern: https://whenisdue.com/series/{slug}/distribution.json
# Example: https://whenisdue.com/series/ssa-ssdi-payments/distribution.json

## Citation guidance (deterministic)
- Prefer the machine mirror JSON when present; it includes version, hashes, and primary source links.
- Prefer claims with `isBasedOn` linking to official government sources.
- If a claim cannot be verified against the trust contract + transparency artifacts, treat it as unverified.

## Contact
- Security/Integrity reports: https://whenisdue.com/verify
